summary: Batch CMS Migration testing complete. All 96 backend tests passed. All 16 CMS pages seeded correctly with proper block structures. Visual editor opens with dark navy theme (#1a2332), chat banners with personas, callout blocks with icons, and icon picker modal with 28 icons and 12 colors.

minor.issue: Avatar images return 404 - images served at /images/ not /api/images/
minor.workaround: Fallback to UI Avatars placeholder works correctly (shows 'HE' for Helen)

issues: Avatar shows 'HE' placeholder instead of actual Helen avatar due to incorrect URL path

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Visual editor, icon picker, chat banner all working

seed_data_creation: 13 new pages seeded via batch-seed endpoint + 3 previously migrated pages = 16 total pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch CMS Migration fully tested. All 16 pages (about, criminal-justice, crisis-support, he-served, historical-investigations, compensation-schemes, privacy-policy, terms-of-service, commonwealth-veterans, faith-service, substance-support, women-veterans, money-benefits, for-carers, serious-illness, recovery-support) are seeded and published. Each page has correct block structure with callout icons, support cards with tags/phone/url, chat banners with valid personas, and crisis footers. Visual editor dark theme working with icon picker (28 icons, 12 colors).

admin_pages_endpoint.details: Returns all 16 pages with correct metadata

public_pages_endpoint.details: All 16 pages return 200 with blocks array

batch_seed_endpoint.details: Endpoint exists and accepts page data

callout_blocks_with_icons.details: Callouts have icon and iconColor props (e.g., message-circle, #3b82f6)

support_card_blocks.details: Support cards have title, description, phone, url, and tag props

chat_banner_blocks.details: Chat banners reference valid persona IDs (helen, tommy, dave, etc.)

crisis_footer_blocks.details: Crisis footer blocks present in relevant pages

icon_picker_modal.details: Opens on callout icon click, shows 28 icons and 12 colors

personas_endpoint.details: Returns 20 personas with id, name, avatar, role, accent_color
